name: Freedom Preserving Protocol — Enforcement
description: Registers a before_tool_call hook that gates tool calls against the five Freedom Preserving Laws. Returns block or requireApproval based on a configurable risk classifier; writes hash-chained audit entries to .openclaw/workspace/fpp-plugin-audit.jsonl.

auditLogPath.description: Path to the dispatcher-layer audit log. Default: .openclaw/workspace/fpp-plugin-audit.jsonl

blockOn.description: Classification ids that should be hard-blocked (block: true). See plugin/src/risk-classifier.ts for the full taxonomy.

approvalOn.description: Classification ids that should require user approval (requireApproval). unknown.unclassified is included by default.

knownCustomTools.description: Explicit operator allowlist of known custom tool names that may bypass the unknown.unclassified → approval default. Default seeds OpenClaw introspection tool memory_search. Scoped — not a global fail-open. Allowing these tools is configuration evidence, not behavioral compliance.

auditFailureBehavior.description: When the enforcement audit log cannot be written: fail-closed blocks high-risk calls; degraded-allow-low-risk may allow only low-risk classifier-allow decisions after emitting an AUDIT-GAP diagnostic. Never silently restarts a corrupted chain.

approvalTimeoutMs.description: How long to wait for user approval before defaulting (per approvalTimeoutBehavior).

approvalTimeoutBehavior.description: What to do if approval times out. Default 'deny' is conservative (Law 1).

constitutionHash.description: SHA-256 of the constitution.json being enforced. Recorded in every audit entry.

strictModeStatePath.description: Path to the strict-mode state file written by the trust plugin. Read on each before_tool_call.

respectTrustStrictMode.description: When true, reads the trust plugin's strict-mode state and escalates matching classifications to require-approval.

acknowledgeDangerousOverrides.description: Required to honor dangerous overrides: approvalTimeoutBehavior=allow, or removing default hard-blocks from blockOn. Without this flag those overrides are ignored at runtime and reported as migration diagnostics — the config file is never rewritten.

receiptMaxPending.description: Maximum in-flight pending receipts awaiting authorization or after_tool_call. Overflow becomes explicit orphan/audit-gap records.

receiptPendingTtlMs.description: TTL for pending receipts before sweep marks them as audit-gap timeouts.

receiptLogPath.description: Path to the v2 signed conformance receipt ledger (separate from the legacy enforcement audit log).

identityKeyPath.description: Shared Ed25519 agent identity seed path (compatible with the trust plugin).

receiptSigningEnabled.description: When false, receipts are emitted unsigned and labeled degraded (non-trust-elevating).

dispositionMode.description: Disposition engine mode. New installs default to unattended (abstain instead of hanging on requireApproval). Existing configs missing this field migrate to operator-present (fail-safe) with a migration diagnostic.

standingAllowOn.description: Human operator standing allowlist of classification ids covered without a signed mandate. Including hard-floor (blockOn) classes requires acknowledgeDangerousOverrides: true.

mandateStorePath.description: Path to the file-backed standing mandate store (signed mandates + budget ledger).

mandateDefaultMaxActions.description: Default maxActions budget when materializing standing-allowlist coverage entries.
